designBrief.silhouette: compact agile chassis with one small visible turret
designBrief.palette: cool steel blue with blue/white emissive accents
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a blue faction light attack vehicle / flanker in an alien RTS. Material: precision-machined composite, clean panel seams. Palette: cool steel blue with blue/white emissive accents, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: modular, sensor-studded, ordered geometry, shield emitter nodes. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: bulky cargo body, long siege barrel. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, orthographic texture sheet depicting a cool steel blue precision-machined composite hull segment for a sci-fi light attack flanker. The surface features an intricate array of alien industrial detailing, including microscopic, almost crystalline vent patterns and glowing blue/white emissive conduits that trace perfectly clean, razor-sharp panel seams. The composite material exhibits a subtle, high-tech weave beneath its pristine finish, rendered completely flat without perspective, baked lighting, or text, ideal for a tiling texture map.

Generate a flat, orthographic, seamless texture map of a high-performance sci-fi vehicle hull section, designed for a light attack flanker, crafted from cool steel blue precision-machined composite. This segment showcases advanced alien industrial detailing through integrated, subtly pulsing blue/white emissive filaments resembling intricate biological circuitry, interwoven with clean, flowing panel seams. The surface also includes complex etched patterns suggestive of advanced alien data transfer pathways, presented without perspective, baked lighting, or any text, optimized for seamless tiling.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
